title: Curvefield — Elliptic-Curve Cryptography Lab
description: An interactive ECC lab: the geometric group law, finite-field curves, a from-scratch secp256k1 cryptosystem (ECDSA + BIP-340 Schnorr + MuSig2), Curve25519, a hand-written BLS12-381 pairing with signature aggregation, Schnorr adaptor signatures and atomic swaps, BIP-32 HD wallets, and discrete-log + invalid-curve attacks — all computed live in the browser with zero crypto dependencies.
